Forside - Norges Blindeforbund

https://www.blindeforbundet.no/
Avvik: 52 | Bestått: 152
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="mr-4 inline-block h-10 w-10 md:h-12 md:w-12" fill="none" viewbox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="24" cy="24" fill="#FFDF00" r="24"></circle><path d="M18.5138 29V
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="h4">Kontakt oss</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 3 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main-content' appears 3 times

id="main-content"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P3M456" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-inline--fa fa-magnifying-glass" data-icon="magnifying-glass" data-prefix="fas" focusable="false" role="img" viewbox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

MODERATE

Synspunkt - Norges Blindeforbund

https://www.blindeforbundet.no/om-blindeforbundet/medlemsbladet-synspunkt
Avvik: 91 | Bestått: 275
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="mr-4 inline-block h-10 w-10 md:h-12 md:w-12" fill="none" viewbox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="24" cy="24" fill="#FFDF00" r="24"></circle><path d="M18.5138 29V
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund'

<a aria-label="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund" class="block rounded-2xl outline-offset-4 focus:outline dark:focus:outline-white" href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindefor
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="hover:underline" href="https://goo.gl/maps/dXVPvGHESEDJDK4E6" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank">Sporveisgata 10, 0354 Oslo</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.innsamlingskontrollen.no/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="innsamlingskontrollen" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="70" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffoo
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.anicura.no/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="anicura" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="60" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffooter%2Fanicura.png&w=256&
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.appetitt.com/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="appetitt" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="35" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffooter%2Fappetitt.png&w=
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.specsavers.no/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="specsavers" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="40" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffooter%2Fspecsavers.png&a
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.miljofyrtarn.no/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="miljofyr" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="60" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffooter%2Fmiljofyr.png&
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Søk" class="absolute right-5 top-1/4 focus:border-b-[3px] focus:outline-none dark:border-b-white dark:text-white dark:peer-focus:text-black" tabindex="-1" type="submit"><svg aria-h
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Norges Blindeforbund | Synshemmedes organisasjon

https://www.blindeforbundet.no/brosjyrer
Avvik: 32 | Bestått: 101
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="mr-4 inline-block h-10 w-10 md:h-12 md:w-12" fill="none" viewbox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="24" cy="24" fill="#FFDF00" r="24"></circle><path d="M18.5138 29V
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund'

<a aria-label="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund" class="block rounded-2xl outline-offset-4 focus:outline dark:focus:outline-white" href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindefor
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="hover:underline" href="https://goo.gl/maps/dXVPvGHESEDJDK4E6" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank">Sporveisgata 10, 0354 Oslo</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.innsamlingskontrollen.no/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="innsamlingskontrollen" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="70" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffoo
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.anicura.no/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="anicura" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="60" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffooter%2Fanicura.png&w=256&
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.appetitt.com/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="appetitt" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="35" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffooter%2Fappetitt.png&w=

MODERATE

MODERATE

<a href="https://www.miljofyrtarn.no/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="miljofyr" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="60" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffooter%2Fmiljofyr.png&
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Søk" class="absolute right-5 top-1/4 focus:border-b-[3px] focus:outline-none dark:border-b-white dark:text-white dark:peer-focus:text-black" tabindex="-1" type="submit"><svg aria-h
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (23 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P3M456" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Tilbud og kurs - Norges Blindeforbund

https://www.blindeforbundet.no/tilbud-kurs-og-arrangementer
Avvik: 51 | Bestått: 127
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="mr-4 inline-block h-10 w-10 md:h-12 md:w-12" fill="none" viewbox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="24" cy="24" fill="#FFDF00" r="24"></circle><path d="M18.5138 29V
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (14 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund'

<a aria-label="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund" class="block rounded-2xl outline-offset-4 focus:outline dark:focus:outline-white" href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindefor
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (238 characters)

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="hover:underline" href="https://goo.gl/maps/dXVPvGHESEDJDK4E6" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank">Sporveisgata 10, 0354 Oslo</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Søk" class="absolute right-5 top-1/4 focus:border-b-[3px] focus:outline-none dark:border-b-white dark:text-white dark:peer-focus:text-black" tabindex="-1" type="submit"><svg aria-h
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (34 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body><div class="min-h-full w-full bg-transparent"><noscript><iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P3M456" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="h2">Kontakt</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5>Spør på nett</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5

Forside - Norges Blindeforbund

https://www.blindeforbundet.no/
Avvik: 52 | Bestått: 152
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="mr-4 inline-block h-10 w-10 md:h-12 md:w-12" fill="none" viewbox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="24" cy="24" fill="#FFDF00" r="24"></circle><path d="M18.5138 29V
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="h4">Kontakt oss</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 3 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (13 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund'

<a aria-label="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund" class="block rounded-2xl outline-offset-4 focus:outline dark:focus:outline-white" href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindefor
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'main-content' appears 3 times

id="main-content"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="h4 mb-">Ring oss</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund'

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Søk" class="absolute right-5 top-1/4 focus:border-b-[3px] focus:outline-none dark:border-b-white dark:text-white dark:peer-focus:text-black" tabindex="-1" type="submit"><svg aria-h

4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (22 avvik)

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

OSLO RÅDHUS - Norges Blindeforbund

https://www.blindeforbundet.no/fylkeslag/akershus/aktiviteter/oslo-radhus
Avvik: 34 | Bestått: 105
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="mr-4 inline-block h-10 w-10 md:h-12 md:w-12" fill="none" viewbox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="24" cy="24" fill="#FFDF00" r="24"></circle><path d="M18.5138 29V
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>OSLO RÅDHUS                       </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund'

<a aria-label="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund" class="block rounded-2xl outline-offset-4 focus:outline dark:focus:outline-white" href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindefor
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Form input has no label

Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

Råd og rettigheter - Norges Blindeforbund

https://www.blindeforbundet.no/rad-tips-og-rettigheter
Avvik: 62 | Bestått: 128
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="mr-4 inline-block h-10 w-10 md:h-12 md:w-12" fill="none" viewbox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="24" cy="24" fill="#FFDF00" r="24"></circle><path d="M18.5138 29V
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

MINOR

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Søk" class="absolute right-5 top-1/4 focus:border-b-[3px] focus:outline-none dark:border-b-white dark:text-white dark:peer-focus:text-black" tabindex="-1" type="submit"><svg aria-h
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (37 avvik)

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P3M456" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Podkast - Norges Blindeforbund

https://www.blindeforbundet.no/lyd

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)

SERIOUS

2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Søk" class="absolute right-5 top-1/4 focus:border-b-[3px] focus:outline-none dark:border-b-white dark:text-white dark:peer-focus:text-black" tabindex="-1" type="submit"><svg aria-h
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['template', 'template', 'template']

<ul><li class="border-b-[3px] first-of-type:border-t-[3px]"><a class="flex items-center justify-between py-4 hover:underline" href="/lyd/radio-z-podkast/9ab4f16b983d4482aeb421dbc89e85cd">Radio Z Podka
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (413 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P3M456" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-inline--fa fa-magnifying-glass" data-icon="magnifying-glass" data-prefix="fas" focusable="false" role="img" viewbox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-inline--fa fa-arrow-right text-black" data-icon="arrow-right" data-prefix="fas" focusable="false" role="img" viewbox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="mr-4 inline-block h-10 w-10 md:h-12 md:w-12" fill="none" viewbox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="24" cy="24" fill="#FFDF00" r="24"></circle><path d="M18.5138 29V
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

Heading is empty

<h2><strong> </strong></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed

Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Operatur til Normoria, Kristiansund, og operaen Anne Pedersdotter. - Norges Blindeforbund

https://www.blindeforbundet.no/fylkeslag/more-og-romsdal/aktiviteter/operatur-til-normoria-kristiansund-og-operaen-anne-pedersdotter-1
Avvik: 34 | Bestått: 103
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="mr-4 inline-block h-10 w-10 md:h-12 md:w-12" fill="none" viewbox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="24" cy="24" fill="#FFDF00" r="24"></circle><path d="M18.5138 29V
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund'

<a aria-label="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund" class="block rounded-2xl outline-offset-4 focus:outline dark:focus:outline-white" href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindefor
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a data-linktype="external" data-val="https://www.oik.no/tixevents/41666" href="https://www.oik.no/tixevents/41666">https://www.oik.no/tixevents/41666</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="hover:underline" href="https://goo.gl/maps/dXVPvGHESEDJDK4E6" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank">Sporveisgata 10, 0354 Oslo</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.innsamlingskontrollen.no/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="innsamlingskontrollen" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="70" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffoo
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

<a href="https://www.anicura.no/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="anicura" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="60" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffooter%2Fanicura.png&w=256&

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="form__select -ml-[2px]"><option>Velg kalendertype</option><option label="iCal" value="iCal">iCal</option><option label="Google" value="Google">Google</option><option label="Outlook" val
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Søk" class="absolute right-5 top-1/4 focus:border-b-[3px] focus:outline-none dark:border-b-white dark:text-white dark:peer-focus:text-black" tabindex="-1" type="submit"><svg aria-h
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (23 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P3M456" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="mr-4 inline-block h-10 w-10 md:h-12 md:w-12" fill="none" viewbox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="24" cy="24" fill="#FFDF00" r="24"></circle><path d="M18.5138 29V
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="hover:underline" href="https://goo.gl/maps/dXVPvGHESEDJDK4E6" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank">Sporveisgata 10, 0354 Oslo</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="form__select -ml-[2px]"><option>Velg kalendertype</option><option label="iCal" value="iCal">iCal</option><option label="Google" value="Google">Google</option><option label="Outlook" val
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Søk" class="absolute right-5 top-1/4 focus:border-b-[3px] focus:outline-none dark:border-b-white dark:text-white dark:peer-focus:text-black" tabindex="-1" type="submit"><svg aria-h
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Søk" class="absolute right-5 top-1/4 focus:border-b-[3px] focus:outline-none dark:border-b-white dark:text-white dark:peer-focus:text-black" tabindex="-1" type="submit"><svg aria-h
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Fylkeslag - Norges Blindeforbund

https://www.blindeforbundet.no/fylkeslag
Avvik: 48 | Bestått: 146
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="mr-4 inline-block h-10 w-10 md:h-12 md:w-12" fill="none" viewbox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="24" cy="24" fill="#FFDF00" r="24"></circle><path d="M18.5138 29V
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund'

<a aria-label="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund" class="block rounded-2xl outline-offset-4 focus:outline dark:focus:outline-white" href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindefor
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="hover:underline" href="https://goo.gl/maps/dXVPvGHESEDJDK4E6" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank">Sporveisgata 10, 0354 Oslo</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Information in English - Norges Blindeforbund

https://www.blindeforbundet.no/om-blindeforbundet/information-in-english
Avvik: 31 | Bestått: 100
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="mr-4 inline-block h-10 w-10 md:h-12 md:w-12" fill="none" viewbox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="24" cy="24" fill="#FFDF00" r="24"></circle><path d="M18.5138 29V
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund'

<a aria-label="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindeforbund" class="block rounded-2xl outline-offset-4 focus:outline dark:focus:outline-white" href="/"><img alt="Gå til forsiden. Logo, Norges Blindefor
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="hover:underline" href="https://goo.gl/maps/dXVPvGHESEDJDK4E6" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank">Sporveisgata 10, 0354 Oslo</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.innsamlingskontrollen.no/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="innsamlingskontrollen" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="70" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffoo
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.anicura.no/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="anicura" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="60" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffooter%2Fanicura.png&w=256&
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.appetitt.com/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="appetitt" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="35" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffooter%2Fappetitt.png&w=
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.specsavers.no/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="specsavers" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="40" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffooter%2Fspecsavers.png&a

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.miljofyrtarn.no/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><img alt="miljofyr" data-nimg="1" decoding="async" height="60" loading="lazy" src="/_next/image?url=%2Ffooter%2Fmiljofyr.png&
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Søk" class="absolute right-5 top-1/4 focus:border-b-[3px] focus:outline-none dark:border-b-white dark:text-white dark:peer-focus:text-black" tabindex="-1" type="submit"><svg aria-h
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);\\n })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (21 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P3M456" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://blindeforbundet.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://blindeforbundet.no --max-pages 21 --format html
